title: Teladoc Health Free Cash Flow and Cash Trends 2024-2025
text: Teladoc Health Free Cash Flow and Cash Trends 2024-2025. Full Year 2024 Performance: Operating cash flow $293.7M (down from $350M), Free cash flow $169.6M (down from $193.7M), Q4 FCF $56.3M (vs Q4 2023 $93.6M). Q1 2025: Free cash flow use $15.7M (vs use $26.6M in Q1 2024, seasonally weak). Q2 2025: Free cash flow $61.2M (vs $60.9M in Q2 2024), Operating cash flow $91.4M (vs $88.7M in Q2 2024). Full Year 2025 Outlook: Free cash flow $166.9M (2% decrease YoY). Company expects to maintain relatively stable cash generation despite revenue and EBITDA headwinds, particularly from BetterHelp challenges.
